title: eulophia clavicornis var. nutans
intro: Eulophia clavicornis var. nutans, also known as the nutans orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with the nutans orchid include wound healing, anti-aging, and immune system support, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by boiling the roots or rhizomes to make a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
